en: Let us die young and let us live forever We don't have the power but we never say never
ko: 젊어서 죽게 해줘, 그리고 영원히 살게 해줘
ja: 若くして死なせて、永遠に生きさせて
zhTW: 讓我們年輕就死，讓我們永遠活著
vi: Hay de chung ta chet tre va song mai mai

en: Sitting in a sandpit, life is a short trip The music's both a sad man
ja: 砂場に座って、人生は短い旅
zhTW: 坐在沙坑裡，人生是短暫的旅程
vi: Ngoi trong ho cat, doi la chuyen di ngan

en: Can you imagine when this race is won? Turn our golden faces into the sun
ko: 이 경주가 끝나면 상상할 수 있어?
ja: このレースが終わった時を想像できる？
zhTW: 你能想像這場比賽結束時嗎？
vi: Ban co tuong tuong duoc khi cuoc dua nay ket thuc

en: Praising the leaders we're getting into The music's played by the, the madmen
ja: リーダーたちを讃えながら僕らは深みにはまっていく
zhTW: 讚美著領袖們，我們越陷越深
vi: Ca ngoi nhung nguoi dan dau, chung ta dang di sau vao

en: Forever young, I wanna be Forever young, forever young
vi: Toi muon mai mai tre trung

en: Do you really wanna live forever? Forever and ever
ja: 本当に永遠に生きたい？
vi: Ban co that su muon song mai khong

en: Forever young, I wanna be Forever young, forever young
vi: Toi muon mai mai tre trung
